name: Workflow suggestion
about: Suggest an improvement or new workflow as product feedback

CueScope is source-available, not open source. Suggestions are welcome as
product feedback, but Greenhouse Ventures LLC is not accepting unsolicited code
contributions, forks, or feature pull requests at public launch.

## Problem

What live-production or setup problem should this solve?


## Proposed behavior


## Mode and safety

- [ ] This should work in Review Mode as read-only analysis, validation, or planning.
- [ ] This requires Control Mode because it controls vMix directly.
- [ ] This requires High-Impact Control because it starts/stops recording or streaming, runs scripts, changes presets, changes outputs, or performs destructive input actions.
